response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:10: Performance of 'Kiss Me!'. On-screen text 'Kiss me' confirms the title. Used the search tool to find the lyrics, identifying the producer as 'picco'. 2. 01:11-end: Performance of 'Triangle Dreamer'. On-screen text 'トライアングル・ドリーマー' confirms the title. Used the search tool to find the lyrics, identifying the original artist as 'Niji no Conquistador' and the composer as 'Motonari Murakawa'. 3. Formatted lyrics and metadata into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by VTubers FUWAMOCO from Hololive. It begins with a short song 'Kiss Me!' (by picco), followed by a full-length performance of 'Triangle Dreamer' (originally by Niji no Conquistador). Both songs are in Japanese.

scenes.description: The video opens with a performance of the song 'Kiss Me!' featuring four VTubers dancing. The on-screen text shows 'Kiss me' in the top-left corner.

どこにだって連れってくれる
カラフルな世界の中で
いつも王子さまを待っているの

とけちゃいそうな魔法をかけて

秘密のコトバ隠れてる

とけちゃいそうな愛を見せて
アナタから
